step_rationale: Antioxidant enzyme suppressing lipid oxidation and endothelial oxidative stress in atherogenesis.
mechanism: Glutathione peroxidase limits oxidative modification of retained lipoproteins and protects endothelial function.

references.title: Enhancing Endothelial Function with Nutrient-Enriched Table Hen Eggs: A Randomized Study in Patients Recovering from Acute Coronary Syndrome.
Oxidative Stress Biomarkers, Nut-Related Antioxidants, and Cardiovascular Disease.
